details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level dirs (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) all present. reports/audit/ exists but reports/board/ is missing.

reports/board/ directory missing. memory_bank/ has key docs (systemPatterns.md, TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md, report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md). .cursor/automations/ exists with README.md and spec files. reports/audit/ exists.

Moltbot code found in repo (not in audit/docs exclusion zone): moltbot/ directory (5 .py files), scripts/run_molt_workflow.py (imports from moltbot), scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py (references Moltbot), scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py (references Clawdbot removal).

github_issue: Unable to create/update GitHub issue via automation (gh CLI is read-only). Anomalies require manual review: reports/board/ missing, moltbot/ directory still present with active code references.
